title: Wikicraft Spotlight
description: Wikicraft Spotlight — A Fabric mod for Minecraft 26.1 & 1.21.11 that adds a Spotlight-style search overlay (press G) for the Minecraft Wiki. Browse articles, save favorites to slots, and switch between 7 themes.
body:
![PaleOak Spotlight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/334b6ad36ff186f1c2d67c6071316fa7db557ec3_0.webp)

# Wikicraft Spotlight

## Search the Minecraft Wiki without leaving your game.

Ever alt-tabbed mid-build just to look up a crafting recipe, mob drop, or biome detail? Wikicraft Spotlight brings the entire Minecraft Wiki right into your game with a single keypress.

Press G (editable) to open a fast, Spotlight-style search overlay. Type your query, browse results, and read full wiki articles — all without ever leaving Minecraft.

_**I recommend setting the GUI scaling to three, but it runs sharp on all scales.**_

### Features
- ⚡ **Instant Wiki Search** — Search any Minecraft Wiki article in real-time
- 📖 **Built-in Browser** — Read full articles with an integrated viewer, no alt-tab needed
- 💾 **Save Favorites** — Pin articles to quick-access slots for instant recall
- 🎨 **7 Themes** — Stone, Obsidian, Pale Oak, Oak, Cherry, Nether & Ocean — each with unique pixel art and textures inspired by the game
- 🌍 **Multi-Language** — Switch between all available wiki languages on the fly
- 💾 **Persistent Settings** — Your theme and language preferences are saved between sessions

![InGame Browser](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e4c900dd6247aa580cd8f3f1d9cbe25c3c52aa0.png)

### Requirements
- Minecraft 1.21.11
- Fabric Loader
- MCEF 2.2.0

---

*Built for everyone who's tired of leaving the game just to check the wiki.*
![Spotlight Search](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b58e240f914ee308bc23ed4ebfa938bd80f6614c_0.webp)
